name: Modern Kids' Nightstand Dark Gray - Pillowfort™
description: Fully load your kid's space with modern style using the Modern Nightstand from Pillowfort™. This dark gray nightstand features two drawers with integrated handles to provide ample space for organization of their storybooks, art supplies and more, while the tabletop provides a convenient spot for a lamp and clock. Made with wood, this square nightstand stands on slanted four legs in natural shade for easy integration into a wide variety of decor styles.
